title: Intensely Smoky Indian Paneer Curry
description: A smoky and pillowy Indian curry featuring paneer, this dish is lightly influenced by Malaysian flavors and is perfect for a weeknight dinner, simmered to perfection with a dash of friendly spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to brown.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the smoked paprika and garam masala and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the tomato puree and coconut milk, and stir to combine.
Add the paneer cubes and stir gently to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes, or until the paneer is cooked through and the sauce has thickened.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
